papers.title: The ZAO Whitepaper
papers.summary: What The ZAO is, how the Fractal governs, the four lanes it builds, and the open-source agentic future. The vision in plain words.
papers.description: A decentralized impact network returning profit, data, and IP to independent artists. This document explains the mission, governance model, and the four core lanes of development.

papers.title: The ZAO Technical Whitepaper
papers.summary: The mechanism: Respect math, the Fibonacci curve, OREC and the on-chain contracts, and the monetary-policy proposal. The proof under the vision.
papers.description: Technical specification of Respect governance, on-chain architecture, and monetary policy for the Fractal democracy.

papers.title: The ZAO Manifesto
papers.summary: The short signable creed. Five commitments. Signing it (an on-chain hat) is how you become a member.
papers.description: Five commitments that define membership in The ZAO: I Contribute, I Build in the Open, I Honor Creator Ownership, I Govern by Contribution, I Believe in the Gift.

papers.title: The WaveWarZ Whitepaper
papers.summary: WaveWarZ is the flagship music prediction market where artists are paid instantly and the value stays in the ecosystem.
papers.description: A music prediction market on Solana where artists battle and fans trade on the outcome. Nearly 98 cents of every dollar traded stays in the ecosystem.
